prestazioni: Engine swap to a **LS3 6.2L V8 (L99 variant, 430hp stock)** with a **Holley HP EFI ECU** and **FAST 102mm LSX intake manifold** for optimized airflow, paired with a **Harrop HTV2300 supercharger (12psi boost)** and **ID1000x injectors** for E85 compatibility, retaining the **Tremec TR-6060 6-speed manual transmission** with a **PPG close-ratio gearset (2.97:1 1st gear)** and **South Bend twin-disc clutch** for torque handling

Full **Whiteline front and rear sway bars (24mm adjustable)** with **SuperPro poly bushings** and **Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers (8-position damping, 50mm drop)** to eliminate body roll, complemented by a **Cusco 2.5-way LSD** for rear-wheel traction under boost

Custom **3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system** with **MagnaFlow 14815 mufflers** and **Pacesetter headers (1.75-inch primaries, 3-inch collectors)** for scavenging, paired with a **TurboSmart Race Port BOV** and **AEM X-Series wideband AFR gauge** for real-time tuning adjustments
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber front splitter, and duckbill rear wing)** with **custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap** and **blacked-out Holden lion badges** for a stealth OEM+ look

**Work Meister S1 3P 18x10.5 +15 (front) and 18x11 +25 (rear) wheels** wrapped in **Nitto NT05R 295/35R18 (front) and 315/30R18 (rear) tires**, with **custom extended wheel studs (14x1.5)** and **DBA 5000 Series rotors (slotted, 356mm front, 343mm rear)** for aggressive stance and braking

**OEM Holden HSV GTS grille (black mesh) with a **custom LED bar integration** behind the grille for a modern touch, paired with **Morimoto XB LED headlights (projector-style, 5500K)** and **Anzo USA taillight tint overlays (smoked with red halo LEDs)** for a menacing rear profile
